attacks.finding: Composite pathways are capped at 6 per case.
Rejected only for pathways with at least two required mechanisms and traceable lineages/hashes.
Single-mechanism attempts are explicitly scored invalid for composite cases.
Forbidden-term scan found no direct mechanism labels.
Bounded. The composite arm uses deterministic interaction scoring over activation weights and support evidence.
Expected labels are used only after activated mechanisms and composite pathways are generated.
Rejected if a pathway lacks motifs, lineages, or lineage hashes.
Survives in bounded form because cases are deliberately composite-specific.

invalidated_claims: Composite-specific case construction has no effect.
Every activated mechanism combination is valid.
surviving_claims: Composite pathways beat single-mechanism and preservation-only baselines.
True composite pathways are supported by motifs, lineages, and lineage hashes.
Prompt-label leakage was not found by forbidden-term scan.
